allow:
Bash(powershell -File - <<'PS1'
Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*uvicorn*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List
PS1)

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PS1'
Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'python.exe' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List
PS1)
